title: Leashable Players - Compatibility patch
description: A modified version of the original Leashable Players mod.
body:
A fork of the original Leashable Players mod by pog5 [https://modrinth.com/mod/leashable-players].

This version makes the leash appear at the correct height when the leashed player has scale attribute different from 1.0 and fixes an issue that made the leash appear higher when the player looks downwards.

It also removes the option to unleash a player by right clicking them, forcing the owner to break the leash instead. This is meant to improve compatibility with mods that force right clicks on players to perform certain actions.
